## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass locally: `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests`
- [ ] Lint is clean: `ruff check src/ tests/ tools/`
- [ ] No new runtime dependencies (standard library only)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] For knowledge-pack entries: the facts are accurate and, where possible, cite the public API/source
